mapper.select: SELECT A.COLUMN_ID AS columnId, A.COLUMN_NAME AS columnName, B.ORDER_NUM AS orderNum, C.CARD_ID AS cardId, B.TITLE AS title, C.CARD_INFO AS cardInfo, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, D.PREDICTED_START_DATE AS predictedStartDate, D.PREDICTED_END_DATE AS predictedEndDate FROM TB_KANBAN_COLUMN A JOIN TB_KANBAN_CARD B ON A.COLUMN_ID = B.COLUMN_ID JOIN TB_KANBAN_CARD_INFO C ON B.CARD_ID = C.CARD_ID JOIN TB_KANBAN_CARD_SCHEDULE D ON B.CARD_ID = D.CARD_ID WHERE A.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY A.COLUMN_ID ASC, B.ORDER_NUM ASC, B.CARD_ID ASC
SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDER_NUM), -1) + 1 FROM TB_KANBAN_CARD WHERE COLUMN_ID = #{columnId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_KANBAN_CARD(CARD_ID, COLUMN_ID, TITLE, ORDER_NUM, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES( #{cardId}, #{columnId}, #{title}, #{orderNum}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_KANBAN_COLUMN WHERE COLUMN_ID = #{columnId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_KANBAN_CARD SET COLUMN_ID = #{columnId}, TITLE = #{title}, ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CARD_ID = #{cardId}
UPDATE TB_KANBAN_CARD_INFO SET CARD_INFO = #{cardInfo} WHERE CARD_ID = #{cardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_KANBAN_CARD_SCHEDULE(CARD_ID, PREDICTED_START_DATE, PREDICTED_END_DATE) VALUES( #{cardId}, #{predictedStartDate}, #{predictedEndDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_KANBAN_CARD SET COLUMN_ID = #{card.columnId}, ORDER_NUM = #{card.orderNum}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CARD_ID = #{card.cardId}
